1→"""Plan context provider for PR description generation. 2→ 3→This module provides plan context for branches linked to plans, 4→enabling more accurate PR descriptions that understand the "why" behind changes. 5→""" 6→ 7→from dataclasses import dataclass 8→from pathlib import Path 9→ 10→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.types import IssueNotFound 11→from erk_shared.gateway.remote_github.abc import RemoteGitHub 12→from erk_shared.plan_store.backend import ManagedPrBackend 13→from erk_shared.plan_store.types import PrNotFound 14→ 15→ 16→@dataclass(frozen=True) 17→class PlanContext: 18→ """Context from an erk plan for PR generation. 19→ 20→ Attributes: 21→ pr_id: The PR identifier (e.g., "123" for PR numbers) 22→ plan_content: The full plan markdown content 23→ objective_summary: Optional summary of the parent objective (e.g., "Objective #123: Title") 24→ """ 25→ 26→ pr_id: str 27→ plan_content: str 28→ objective_summary: str | None 29→ 30→

**Changes Applied:**
